39.reason: [Error: Using post-increment `depth++` passes the current value of depth to the recursive call, not depth+1. This causes incorrect depth calculation for leaf nodes. Should be `depth + 1`.]

reasons.buggy-deepseek-chat-1: 0.5 , reason:  [Error: Using post-increment `depth++` passes the current value of depth to the recursive call, not depth+1. This causes incorrect depth calculation for leaf nodes. Should be `depth + 1`.]
reasons.buggy-deepseek-chat-2: 0.5 , reason:  [Error: Using post-increment depth++ passes the current value of depth to the recursive call, then increments it, so the depth for child nodes is not correctly increased by 1. Should use depth+1 instead.]
reasons.buggy-deepseek-reasoner-1: 0.5 , reason:  Post-increment passes original depth, should be depth+1 or ++depth
reasons.buggy-deepseek-reasoner-2: 0.5 , reason:  [Error: uses post-increment, passes current depth instead of depth+1; left child should receive depth+1 but gets depth unchanged]
reasons.buggy-qwen3.6-plus-1: 0.5 , reason:  depth++ is post-increment, it passes the current depth value to the recursive call instead of depth+1, causing incorrect height calculation.
reasons.buggy-qwen3.6-plus-2: 0.5 , reason:  depth++ evaluates to the current depth value before incrementing, so the recursive call receives the wrong depth. It should be depth + 1.
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-1: 0.5 , reason:  [Using post-increment (depth++) passes the original value of depth to the recursive call, so the child node receives the same depth as the parent. Should use pre-increment (++depth) or pass depth+1.]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-2: 0.5 , reason:  [Using post-increment (depth++) passes the original value of depth to the recursive call, so the child node receives the same depth as the parent. Should use pre-increment (++depth) or pass depth+1.]

43.reason: [Error: Same issue as above; post-increment `depth++` passes the current depth instead of depth+1, leading to wrong height values.]

reasons.buggy-deepseek-chat-1: 0.5 , reason:  [Error: Same issue as above; post-increment `depth++` passes the current depth instead of depth+1, leading to wrong height values.]
reasons.buggy-deepseek-chat-2: 0.5 , reason:  [Error: Same issue as above; depth++ passes the original depth value, not depth+1, causing incorrect height calculation for leaf nodes.]
reasons.buggy-deepseek-reasoner-1: 0.5 , reason:  Post-increment passes original depth, should be depth+1 or ++depth
reasons.buggy-deepseek-reasoner-2: 0.5 , reason:  [Error: uses post-increment and relies on the previous increment; right child receives depth+1 only after left has already incremented the variable, causing incorrect depth for both children. Should pass depth+1 without incrementing the variable.]
reasons.buggy-qwen3.6-plus-1: 0.5 , reason:  Same issue: post-increment passes the wrong depth value. Should be depth+1 to correctly propagate the height.
reasons.buggy-qwen3.6-plus-2: 0.5 , reason:  depth++ evaluates to the current depth value before incrementing, so the recursive call receives the wrong depth. It should be depth + 1.
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-1: 0.5 , reason:  [Same issue: post-increment does not increase depth before passing to the function. This causes incorrect height calculation for right subtree nodes.]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-2: 0.5 , reason:  [Same issue: post-increment does not increase depth before passing to the function. This causes incorrect height calculation for right subtree nodes.]
